race.comment: STAR TRIP (13) resumes. He's a lightly raced colt who brings strong form from two runs to date, beating Gold Coast Belle (since a listed winner) on debut at Seymour as favourite before just missing a sharp one at Mornington. Profiles nicely for this and will take beating. IN HASTE (4) was much better second up at Seymour and should get another good run on speed here, respecting. ENDLESS FOREVERS (10) ran well fresh at Ballarat to grab third and can improve with each-way claims. SURPRISATIC (2) ran a good race first up off a short spell, comes back a notch in grade for this and will take some holding out if the gaps come from the inside gate.
